description_long: This is a classic football with a spherical shape and a traditional black-and-white pattern. The surface is composed of alternating pentagonal black and hexagonal white panels, arranged in a tessellated pattern that covers the entire ball. The seams between the panels are slightly visible, suggesting a stitched or bonded construction. The ball's exterior appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of synthetic leather or polyurethane materials used in modern footballs. There are no visible logos, text, or branding elements on the surface. The object is well-maintained, showing no signs of wear, scuffing, or deformation.
description: A classic black-and-white football with a tessellated pentagon-hexagon panel pattern and a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The ball appears new and unbranded.
description_view_0: The football is shown with a clear view of the black and white panel pattern, with the seams and pentagonal panels prominently visible.
description_view_1: This view displays the football from a slightly rotated angle, emphasizing the symmetry of the panel arrangement and the central seam line.
description_view_2: The football is seen from another side, with the hexagonal and pentagonal panels evenly distributed and no visible branding.
description_view_3: This angle highlights the continuity of the panel pattern and the smooth, unblemished surface of the ball.
